notes.obo: OBO PURL base — class IRIs are obo:{ONTOLOGY}_{ID} (e.g., obo:BFO_0000001)
notes.RO: OBO Relation Ontology — standard cross-ontology relations
notes.IAO: Information Artifact Ontology — metadata properties (definitions, deprecation)
notes.oio: OBO in OWL annotations — synonyms, xrefs, subsets
notes.sssom: Simple Standard for Sharing Ontological Mappings
notes.semapv: Semantic Mapping Vocabulary — mapping justification terms
